scripts.serve: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && bun install && bun run start
scripts.verify: cd frontend && npm run test:ci && npm run build && cd ../server && bun run test && bun run typecheck
scripts.rebuild: cd frontend && rm -rf build node_modules && npm install && npm run build && cd ../server && rm -rf node_modules && bun install
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../server && bun install
